title: Filter simultaneously both activities and emails on monday CRM

posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi there,

I’d like to suggest a feature enhancement for the current Monday CRM. It would be incredibly helpful to have the ability to filter both emails and activities simultaneously in the E&A (Emails & Activities) section.

At the moment, it’s only possible to filter one or the other, which limits the ability to get a comprehensive view of all interactions in one place. Having this combined filter would greatly improve usability and workflow efficiency.

Thank you for considering this request!

What are you trying to achieve

Filter simultaneously both activities and emails on monday CRM
